column1: Figure 1: UK rents inflation is rising to record-highs, while UK house price annual inflation remains negative
Private rent and house price annual inflation, UK, January 2016 to March 2024

column2: 1. Northern Ireland private rents data are currently available up to January 2024. To produce UK rents statistics up to March 2024, Northern Ireland's index for the latest two months has been estimated using Great Britain’s inflation rate. UK PIPR estimates for February 2024 and March 2024 will be revised using updated Northern Ireland rents data.
